SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.overpressure

Class ReliefDisposalNetwork

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure.ReliefDisposalNetwork
public final class ReliefDisposalNetwork extends Object
Aggregates the governing relief loads of several protected items that discharge into a shared disposal system (flare or vent header), so that the total simultaneous load can be established for header and flare-tip sizing.

Per API STD 521 section 5.3 and TR3001 section 4.9, the relief loads that can occur at the same time (for example all vessels exposed to a single fire zone) are summed to give the network design load. Loads flagged as non-simultaneous contribute only to the peak-single comparison. A typical workflow runs an OverpressureProtectionStudy per protected item and feeds each OverpressureStudyResult into this network.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • ReliefDisposalNetwork

      public ReliefDisposalNetwork(String name)
      Creates a relief disposal network.
      Parameters:
      name - the network name; not null

  • Method Details

    • addRelief

      public ReliefDisposalNetwork addRelief(OverpressureStudyResult result)
      Adds the governing relief load of a completed study to the network as a simultaneous contribution.
      Parameters:
      result - the overpressure study result; not null
      Returns:
      this network for fluent chaining

    • addRelief

      public ReliefDisposalNetwork addRelief(OverpressureStudyResult result, boolean simultaneous)
      Adds the governing relief load of a completed study to the network.
      Parameters:
      result - the overpressure study result; not null
      simultaneous - true if the load is concurrent with the other network contributions
      Returns:
      this network for fluent chaining

    • addContribution

      public ReliefDisposalNetwork addContribution(ReliefLoadContribution contribution)
      Adds an explicit relief load contribution to the network.
      Parameters:
      contribution - the contribution to add; not null
      Returns:
      this network for fluent chaining

    • calculate

      public ReliefDisposalResult calculate()
      Aggregates the contributions into a ReliefDisposalResult.
      Returns:
      the immutable disposal result

      public String getName()

      Returns:
